description_long: This object consists of two classic hot dogs, each nestled in a soft, light brown bun with a plump sausage inside. The sausages are topped with a generous squiggle of bright yellow mustard, giving a vibrant contrast to the neutral tones of the bun and sausage. The buns appear fluffy and slightly rounded, with a subtle sheen that suggests freshness. Above the hot dogs, bold black and green 3D text spells out 'HOT ALGAE', adding a playful and eye-catching element. The hot dogs are unwrapped and presented side by side, with no visible packaging or tray. The overall appearance is appetizing and whimsical, suitable for a street food vendor or urban food stall setting.
description: Two classic hot dogs in buns with mustard, topped by bold 'HOT ALGAE' text. The presentation is playful and visually appealing, with no visible packaging.
description_view_0: Side view showing the profile of both hot dogs stacked, highlighting the rounded buns and mustard lines.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the hot dogs from above, with the 'HOT ALGAE' text clearly visible above them.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the buns and mustard from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view with mirrored 'HOT ALGAE' text and angled perspective of the hot dogs, emphasizing the sausage and bun shape.
